claim: The myocardial cell lineage originally develops from cardiac progenitors of exclusively endodermal origin.
evidence_sentences: Studies in the mouse embryo and the mouse embryonic stem cell differentiation model have provided evidence indicating that these three lineages develop from a common Flk-1+ (kinase insert domain protein receptor, also known as Kdr) cardiovascular progenitor that represents one of the earliest stages in mesoderm specification to the cardiovascular lineages.

conditions: mouse embryonic stem cell differentiation model
